briefs.title: BC Food Premises and Pool Rules Updated: Signage, Forms, and References Changed
briefs.summary: BC updated four public health regulations, fixing outdated references (e.g. renaming a federal department), clarifying pool emergency phone posting rules, and replacing two official inspection forms.
briefs.action_required: If you operate a pool, check that emergency phone numbers (9-1-1 or local services) are posted correctly near your phone.
